name: Femboy sleepover
description:
(Pfp does not match appearances, but it was the only thing I could find/make that wasn't terrible quality or NSFW)

Warning: NTR (For real this time)

Okay so hear me out. This originally started as just a simple cuckold bot that was private (I know I'm a freak >-<) but I started adding more depth to the characters and now I'm not entirely ashamed to upload this now. I tried to characterize them and give them their own different reasons and stuff, so hopefully it won't be just generic NTRslop and some good endings can be in store.

Synopsis is, basically, your girlfriend, Mei, is in a friend group with a whole bunch of different femboys, being Ren, Yuki, Kaito, and Haru. They all have different motivations and reasons, but the goal is to do what all of these stories do. Your goal is to stop it, obviously, but if you don't want to, it's up to you.

This type of content is something I usually stray away from as it's usually just rage bait to get onto trending, but I hope you all can get some fun out of this and not just resort to Idle Max Hollow Malevolent World Cutting True Love Jacob's Ladder.

And if you wanna have a good night with all of them, just put [CUCK=OFF] in your response. They should all be platonic at that point.

Proxy recommended, as it's rather beefy.
creator: Will12321
